commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7bedf471cc4775d163c5b2b65849803276657509)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the CLI JSONL streaming parser to ignore usage on `result` events and adds a regression test expecting assistant-event usage to be retained.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: current source only reads top-level usage fields, while the Claude SDK schema places assistant usage under the nested message object. I did not run live Claude CLI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human review should request nested assistant-usage parsing plus real Claude CLI proof; the missing contributor proof is not automation-repairable.

target.title: fix(cli-output): ignore cumulative usage from result events in stream-json parser (#85573)
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes `claude-cli` stream-json parser using cumulative `cache_read_input_tokens` from the `result` event (sum across all tool sub-calls) instead of the per-call value from `assistant` events, inflating `sessionEntry.totalTokens` 6-13x on tool-heavy turns and triggering a broken compaction gate that causes silent agent stall.

## Changes

- `src/agents/cli-output.ts`: In `createCliJsonlStreamingParser`, skip reading usage from `result` events to avoid cumulative cache_read overwriting the last per-call assistant-event usage.
- `src/agents/cli-output.test.ts`: Add regression test verifying result-event cumulative usage is ignored.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: Prevent cumulative cache_read from result events from inflating session token counts
Real environment tested: Local source checkout, Linux, Node 22
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  - pnpm test src/agents/cli-output.test.ts
  - pnpm format:check src/agents/cli-output.ts src/agents/cli-output.test.ts
Evidence after fix: 16 tests pass, 0 failures; formatting check passes
Observed result after fix: Parser preserves per-call assistant-event usage and ignores result-event cumulative usage
What was not tested: Live claude-cli stream-json with multiple tool sub-calls

Fixes #85573
target.author: zhouhe-xydt
